appliedUpdates.description: Updated Pi version in gvps note from 0.66.1 to 0.67.1 to match actual installed version
Added ACP capability string constants section, iOS UserDefaults key conventions, and UniFFI ServerSnapshot field addition checklist to provider-transport.md

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: extract shared shell validation logic (containsDangerousShellCharacters) to a utility file instead of duplicating in multiple view files.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: AgentPickerView.swift and ACPProfilesView.swift both contain identical private containsDangerousShellCharacters functions (ios-agent-picker-acp, ios-acp-settings-ui).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Expand the skill to cover model/store creation, Settings UI, build-gate validation, and Rust store changes. Currently scoped only to DiscoveryView/agent selection wiring.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: 4 of 5 iOS features (ios-acp-data-models, ios-acp-settings-ui, ios-acp-capabilities-surfacing, acp-milestone-build-gate) had to deviate significantly from the skill procedure because their work (model creation, Settings UI, Rust store changes, build validation) fell outside the skill's scope.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document that when UniFFI Rust structs change (add/remove fields), iOS test fixtures using those structs must also be updated in the same commit to prevent build breakage.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The capabilities-surfacing feature added agentCapabilities to AppServerSnapshot in Rust, but the build-gate feature had to fix iOS test fixtures that were missing the new field (acp-milestone-build-gate).

rejectedObservations.reason: By design — iOS has its own richer ACPProfile model, reviewed and accepted
Acceptable for user-triggered discovery, not a documentation gap
Already evident from reading the code, not novel library knowledge

rejectedObservations.observation: Platform-ui-worker skill not found at expected path
rejectedObservations.reason: Skill exists and was loaded successfully by workers — path issue is an artifact of the review agent's search

rejectedObservations.observation: Test-only feature doesn't fit Red/Green skill framing
rejectedObservations.reason: Minor skill ergonomics issue, not actionable without broader skill redesign

rejectedObservations.observation: Test helper for authenticated session setup to reduce boilerplate
rejectedObservations.reason: Suggestion for test refactoring, not a documentation/guidance gap
